startDate.description: Date and time when the tournament starts.

endDate.description: Date and time when the tournament ends.

location.description: Location where the tournament is held.

buyIn.description: The buy-in amount for the tournament.

prizePool.description: The total prize pool for the tournament.

description.description: A detailed description of the tournament.
Description of the club and its activities.

contactEmail.description: Contact email address for the club.

CommunityPost.title: CommunityPost
CommunityPost.description: Represents a post in the community forum.

authorName.description: Denormalized author's display name for easy display.

authorPhotoUrl.description: Denormalized URL of the author's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Date and time when the post was created.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Ace Academy platform.

email.description: The email address of the user.

profilePictureUrl.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Date and time when the user registered.

playerId.description: The user's player ID for the poker platform.

hasSchoolAccess.description: Grants user access to the School section (AI Coach, Preflop Charts).

CurriculumModule.title: CurriculumModule
CurriculumModule.description: Represents a module within the poker school's curriculum.

id.description: Unique identifier for the curriculum module.

description.description: Detailed description of what the module covers.

content.description: The actual content of the curriculum module (e.g., text, video URL).

order.description: The order of this module within the overall curriculum.

Tag.title: Tag
Tag.description: Represents a tag for categorizing community posts.

Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description: Represents a global announcement displayed on the homepage.

content.description: The text content of the announcement.

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the announcement was last updated.

Session.title: Session
Session.description: Represents a poker session for a user.

userId.description: The ID of the user who played this session.

date.description: The date and time the session took place.

buyIn.description: The total buy-in amount for the session.

cashOut.description: The final cash-out amount from the session.

profit.description: The net profit or loss from the session (cashOut - buyIn).

durationInMinutes.description: The duration of the session in minutes.

location.description: The location where the session was played (e.g., 'Online', 'Casino Name').

definition.description: Stores user profiles. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores an individual user's poker sessions. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their own session data.

params.name: sessionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the poker session.

definition.description: Stores hand analysis posts. Includes the denormalized 'authorId' field for authorization independence.

params.name: postId
params.description: The unique identifier for the hand analysis post.

definition.description: Stores tags for categorizing community posts. Accessible to all users.

params.name: tagId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tag.

definition.description: Stores curriculum modules for the poker school.

params.name: moduleId
params.description: The unique identifier for the curriculum module.

params.name: clubId
params.description: The unique identifier for the club.

params.name: tournamentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the tournament.

definition.description: Stores global announcements for the homepage. Publicly readable, but only writable by an admin.

params.name: announcementId
params.description: The unique identifier for the announcement (e.g., 'latest').

firestore.reasoning: This Firestore structure prioritizes authorization independence and QAPs. User data is stored under `/users/{userId}`, ensuring path-based ownership. Sessions are a subcollection of users, inheriting ownership. Community posts are segregated under `/hand-analysis-posts/{postId}` with the `authorId` field for ownership reference. This avoids hierarchical authorization dependencies. Tags are stored globally under `/tags/{tagId}`. Clubs and Tournaments are also stored globally. The structure enables efficient `list` operations with simple security rules, as each collection has a homogeneous security posture.
